mnemonics.title: Cayley-Hamilton Theorem
mnemonics.content: Every square matrix satisfies its own characteristic polynomial

mnemonics.title: Characteristic Polynomial
mnemonics.content: A polynomial that encodes information about the matrix's eigenvalues

acronyms.usage: The CHT is a fundamental result in linear algebra

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a polynomial that encodes information about the matrix's eigenvalues

analogies.analogy: Think of the CHT as a recipe that helps you find the eigenvalues of a matrix
